LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED, FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. NO EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT RESPONSIBLE FOR THE FIELDS LOAN AMOUNT. NO EVIDENCE PRESENTED REGARDING THE ESTABLISHMENT OF THE FIELDS ACCOUNT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for Summary Judgment/Summary Adjudication is denied, failure to shift burden of proof. No evidence that defendant responsible for the Fields loan amount. No evidence presented regarding the establishment of the Fields account. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2009 Set For Trial On Nov-16-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-28-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 318
